caption:
"Day 1 “Who Am I?”: We asked our athletes to share a word or phrase that represents their identity and contributes to who they are!

Being a student-athlete goes beyond the field, pool, or court. It means embracing the many facets of who we are: from swimmers and runners to first-gen students and cultural identities like ‘Latino’ and ‘Filipina.’ Each word on this board reflects a piece of us—strengthened through sport, education, and the communities we build along the way. These elements define the resilient, diverse, and ever-evolving student-athlete at UIC.

#chicagoscollegeteam #ncaainclusion #onevalley".

"Make your voice count and help UIC climb the Missouri Valley Conference leaderboard! Join the ALL IN Campus Democracy Challenge by pledging to vote today. By taking the pledge, you’re committing to participate in shaping the future and helping our campus lead in civic engagement🗳️📣

Visit allintovote.org today to take the pledge.
